sections.title: Before completion of Tale of the Righteous

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Duffy's the name. I'm a natural historian from Varrock Museum. My team and I are here to explore this mountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's just an old mountain isn't it? What natural history are you hoping to find here?

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Bahaha, you adventurers are all the same, never seeing past the fights and treasure...

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: This Mountain is steeped in natural history, but our main focus is to study the lizard creatures that surround this area.

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Indeed, they're a fascinating species! We're hoping to learn about their origins and how they've evolved.

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: However, we're not very familiar with this region so we've enlisted the help of the Kourend Grand Library to aid us in our research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you learned so far?

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Well, we have a theory that lizard creatures aren't natural at all, but were created by dark magical experiments.

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Right now we're looking for evidence to prove this theory, but's it's proving somewhat difficult.

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: No thanks adventurer, natural history studies are delicate and precise... but if we ever need something haphazardly destroyed we'll let you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not all adventurers only care about fighting, you know... I was only offering to help.

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: We don't need your help. Run along now, go and play in the dungeons with the other adventurers. I hear they're full of monsters to fight!

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Try not to get yourself killed, it would be such a tragedy!

sections.title: After completion of Tale of the Righteous

lines.speaker: Historian Duffy
lines.text: Good thanks. Now that we've found this cave, we're learning more about the lizardmen than ever before.
